name: Orange-Onion Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 large navel oranges (or 3-4 blood oranges, or Valencia oranges)
1 1/2 tablespoons chopped Anaheim pepper (or jalapeno, serrano)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the oranges and cut them into 1/4 inch dice, removing any seeds.
2. In a bowl, mix together all ingredients.
3. Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate; use within a day.
